text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
With hope in my heart, I entered the school gates for the very first
time... That was the very beginning.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I won my debut race, taking another step forward...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My racing career has begun, and so has my race towards my dream.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
"Middle Distance Basics Volume One..." "The Secret to Racing and
Pacing..."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Doing some studying, Suzuka? You don't usually come to the
library.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru... That's right, my trainer asked me to study the different
ways races can unfold.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, our teacher mentioned that your running strategy should
change based on the distance and track condition, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, in that case, do you want me to give you a reading?! I can tell you the perfect strategy for you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Th-that's okay. I think my trainer and I have it handled.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Judging by your sudden interest in the library, is it safe to assume
your next race has been decided?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove... Yes, my next race is the Yayoi Sho. I've got less than a
month.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, you did debut late. If you're going to take on the Classics, your
schedule is going to be packed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But why would that worry you? You finished your last race in the lead
by seven lengths.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Did you watch my debut race? Thank you for your support.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh?! You went to cheer on Suzuka?! You should've told me—I
would've come along!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I-I was simply there to observe her!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, you need to prepare for the road ahead of you.
Winning consecutive races is no easy task.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I know. That's why I'm here at the library.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What's more, I'll do whatever it takes to see that scenery...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text: 1,000 meters in 58.5 seconds... You're still going too fast.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Understood.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text: The Yayoi Sho is 2,000 meters, so you need to conserve your stamina for the homestretch. Now do another lap, this time with your pace in mind.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Your talents are some of the best I've ever seen. With the proper
preparations, I have no doubt you'll seize victory after victory.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I must pay attention to the movement of those around me and
determine an advantageous position. The goal is to avoid any loss of
momentum or positioning.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
With this strategy, I'll be the first past the finish line every time.
Getting there first is what matters. Nothing else.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Surely... if I follow this method, I will see the scenery I seek.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's done it! She's won by three whole lengths! The Yayoi Sho is
hers!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
After a late start, Silence Suzuka crosses the finish line in eighth
place! She was a favorite to win, but perhaps her inexperience cost
her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(My pace, my position, the track conditions, the weather, and every
move made around me...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (There's so much I have to keep in mind while racing.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just... one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(The sound of my cleats hitting the ground... a pleasant breeze
through my hair... and no one in my path.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (My head feels so clear here. If I could, I would run like this forever.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (But... this running style won't get me to the scenery I—)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: AN UMAMUSUME!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eep! Wh-what?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Woooow! A real-life Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: U-um... Aren't you an Umamusume as well?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah, but outside of looking in a mirror, you're the first one I've
ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! And, and! You look so glamorous when you're runn'n! Like, sooo pretty!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! I-I-I'm sorry! I was staring, wasn't I?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I just transferred to Tracen Academy today! The name's
Special Week!
